title: SX1262.cs rxMode and stateLock race in RX path
description: In SX1262.cs: SendRxEnter(), reader thread, OnPacketReceived callback, and Transmit() SetRx state all access rxMode and irqFlags with inconsistent locking. Some paths use lock(stateLock), others do not. This can cause lost IRQs or incorrect rxMode for PollRx/SetRx one-shot behavior (r7h4.6). Add consistent locking and document the one-shot RX contract. Codereview-P0 correctness. Trace to r7h4.
